properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v6 v7 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here I am Down on my knees again Surrendering all Surrendering all

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And find me here Lord as You draw me near Desperate for You Desperate for You I surrender

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Drench my soul As mercy and grace unfold I hunger and thirst I hunger and thirst

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: With arms stretched wide I know You hear my cry Speak to me now Speak to me now

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: I surrender I surrender I wanna know You more I wanna know You more :/

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Like a rushing wind Jesus breathe within Lord have Your way Lord have Your way in me

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Like a mighty storm Stir within my soul Lord have Your way Lord have Your way in me

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Lord have Your way Lord have Your way in me

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I surrender I surrender I wanna know You more I wanna know You more
